name: Green Infrastructure (2036)
description: Extensive green roofs on 30 flat-roof buildings, 62 new street trees across 6 corridors. Focus on stormwater management and urban heat reduction.
author: planning-agent
principles: Extensive green roofs on flat-roof buildings (lower weight load)
Intensive green roofs only on structurally-suitable 3+ floor buildings
Prioritize streets with lowest existing canopy
Integrate rain gardens at key intersections
